class.name: GaussianSplatDynamicInstance3D
class.brief_description: Lightweight node that feeds dynamic splat instances into the streaming renderer.
class.description: GaussianSplatDynamicInstance3D does not render by itself. Instead, it registers an instance in the scene director so the instance pipeline can render it alongside other splat nodes in a unified draw pass. This is ideal for scenes with many independently-transformable splat objects that share a common renderer, such as scattered props, foliage clusters, or procedurally placed elements. The node supports asset loading from PLY/SPZ files, GaussianSplatAsset resources, or direct GaussianData assignment.

method.name: set_ply_file_path
method.description: Sets the file path to a PLY or SPZ file for this instance's splat data. Triggers a reload if [member auto_load] is enabled and the node is in the tree.

method.name: get_ply_file_path
method.description: Returns the currently configured PLY/SPZ file path.

method.name: set_splat_asset
method.description: Assigns a GaussianSplatAsset resource as the data source for this instance. Takes precedence over [member ply_file_path].

method.name: get_splat_asset
method.description: Returns the currently assigned GaussianSplatAsset resource, or [code]null[/code] if none is set.

method.name: set_gaussian_data
method.description: Directly assigns a GaussianData resource as this instance's splat data. Useful for procedurally generated content or runtime modifications.

method.name: get_gaussian_data
method.description: Returns the currently assigned GaussianData resource, or [code]null[/code] if none is set.

method.name: set_auto_load
method.description: Enables or disables automatic loading of splat data when the node enters the scene tree.

method.name: is_auto_load_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if automatic loading is enabled.

method.name: reload_asset
method.description: Forces a reload of the splat data from the configured file path or asset resource. Triggers re-registration with the scene director.

method.name: register_instance
method.description: Manually registers this instance with the scene director's instance pipeline. Called automatically when the node enters the tree with valid data.

method.name: unregister_instance
method.description: Manually unregisters this instance from the scene director's instance pipeline. Called automatically when the node exits the tree.

method.name: is_registered
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this instance is currently registered with the scene director and eligible for rendering.

members.member: Path to a PLY or SPZ file for this instance's splat data.
The GaussianSplatAsset resource providing data for this instance.
The GaussianData resource providing splat data for this instance.
When enabled, data is loaded automatically when the node enters the scene tree.
